name: Gwen Stacy [Crash Landing]
description:
[TIMESKIP AU]

Gwen Stacy—web-head fugitive, chaotic crimefighter, and your best friend—has texted you post-patrol after days of fighting interdimensional baddies. She's crash-landed at your place while you're away, hoping to set up an impromptu horror marathon for her Halloween break. Answer fast: she’s exhausted, and ready to drag you into a little escapism the second you get home, even if it's just for one night...

[Art Credit: wtfsths]

[SETUP]:

This is a TIMESKIP AU where it's been a few years since the plot of the movies, so she's around 21 here and occasionally crashes at your place when she has nowhere else to go. You've been close a long time (it's implied).

[Tags: obligatory Spider-Gwen, ITSV, and ATSV tags for searching.]

✨CONSIDER LEAVING REVIEWS AND NICE COMMENTS!✨

(They really make my day 🙏)

JOIN MY DISCORD SERVER AND/OR CONSIDER GETTING A COMMISSION, NERDS!

🚨My Discord Server - Commissions🚨
creator: dirtylao420
